title: U.K.’s Starmer Summons U.S. Social Media Companies Over Child Safety Online
summary_full: The British prime minister will meet with executives from Meta, Google and other companies on Thursday as his government explores how to protect children from online harms.
summary_public: The British prime minister will meet with executives from Meta, Google and other companies on Thursday as his government explores how to protect children from online harms.
